author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(HierarchicalMenu): don't give --parent class if data is empty (#5458)
body:
* fix(HierarchicalMenu): don't give parentItem class if data is empty

This happens when the item is refined, but there's no items in the lower level. In InstantSearch.js, we avoid adding the class in this case already:

https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch/blob/f84c01b2f66ac279f7e33fafe5f1cd559436edef/packages/instantsearch.js/src/components/RefinementList/RefinementList.tsx#L175-L179

* also remove the ul, and test
